subject: Project Management
title: The Development Team
description: A short lesson to help you apply The Development Team.

hook.text: In Scrum, the development team is self-organizing. Nobody tells them how to do their work.

buildup.text: Ideal size is 3 to 9 people — small enough to stay nimble, big enough to deliver.

discovery.text: The team is cross-functional: designers, developers, testers all work together, not in silos.

twist.text: Scrum has no job titles within the team. No 'senior' or 'junior.' Just developers.

climax.text: Self-organization is Scrum's hardest ask — and its most powerful idea.

punchline.text: No titles. No hierarchy. Just the work.

quiz.question: What is the recommended size for a Scrum development team?
